name: The Warehouse GC
address: 8350B S Madison St, Burr Ridge, IL 60527
about: The Warehouse GC is a private, membership-based indoor golf training facility focused on providing expert instruction, structured practice plans, and cutting-edge technology for golfers seeking to improve their game. The venue offers a comprehensive environment with 1,600 sq. ft. of putting and chipping green, golf-specific strength training, and advanced data tracking technology. Members receive monthly simulator bay hours and unlimited access to short game areas, supported by a team of instructors and coaches dedicated to skill development across all levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium TrackMan and Foresight simulators for precise swing data
Unlimited short game practice on a realistic 1,600 sq. ft. putting and chipping green
Golf-specific strength training programs designed to enhance performance and prevent injury
Personalized instruction from top-tier coaches with cutting-edge feedback technology

food_and_drink.notes: No bar or alcohol service mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor for swing and ball tracking
Premium photometric camera system for swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility does not mention club rentals, so golfers are expected to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No on-site food or alcohol service is mentioned, and BYOB policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Exact timing for 18 holes is not specified, but simulator bay rentals are available by the hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Warehouse offers dedicated junior golf programs, camps, and coaching for young golfers.
